form.formComment: Missed the frame when eighth (17.13) at this track at last run and returns here after a nine months break. Looks a key runner while fresh.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Lakeside (20.31) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length eighth. Strong record off the draw with two wins and two minors from five starts. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last in a Mix 5 on April 9 over 350m at this track behind Strikes Twice beaten 4 lengths (19.58). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.
